session.user:
Run prettier to check formatting on these specific files: - docs/learned/architecture/circular-import-resolution.md - docs/learned/architecture/no-repo-infrastructure.md - docs/learned/cli/rebase-confirmation-workflow.md - docs/learned/cli/slot-assign-from-current-branch.md - docs/learned/erk-dev/audit-collect-command.md - docs/learned/tui/view-mode-help.md
Use: `prettier --check docs/learned/architecture/circular-import-resolution.md docs/learned/architecture/no-repo-infrastructure.md docs/learned/cli/rebase-confirmation-workflow.md docs/learned/cli/slot-assign-from-current-branch.md docs/learned/erk-dev/audit-collect-command.md docs/learned/tui/view-mode-help.md`
If any fail, also run prettier --write on them and report which files were reformatted.
session.assistant: I'll run prettier to check formatting on those specific documentation files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on specified documentation files

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
prettier passed: All 6 documentation files use correct Prettier code style.
The files are properly formatted: - docs/learned/architecture/circular-import-resolution.md - docs/learned/architecture/no-repo-infrastructure.md - docs/learned/cli/rebase-confirmation-workflow.md - docs/learned/cli/slot-assign-from-current-branch.md - docs/learned/erk-dev/audit-collect-command.md - docs/learned/tui/view-mode-help.md
